title: Participant
description: A participant in a conversation. Participants may be end users, AI agents, or human support agents. Corresponds to a row in the `conversation_participants` table.

conversationId.description: The conversation this participant belongs to.

organizationId.description: The organization that owns this participant record.

type.description: Participant role: `user` = end-user, `ai-agent` = smooth-operator agent, `human-agent` = live support agent.

externalId.description: External identity (e.g. Supabase auth user UUID) for authenticated participants.

internalId.description: Internal system identifier (e.g. agent UUID from the agents table).

browserFingerprint.description: Browser fingerprint (ThumbmarkJS) for anonymous user identification.

browserInfo.description: Parsed browser / device metadata collected at session start.

phone.description: Phone number in E.164 format if known.

crmContactId.description: Foreign key into the CRM contacts table if this participant has been matched.

metadataJson.description: Arbitrary key/value metadata attached to this participant.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the participant record was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the participant record was last updated.
